title: Unlock Hidden Opportunities: Asset Depletion Spotlight
subtitle: Leverage Non-QM asset depletion products to help borrowers with substantial liquid assets overcome income documentation challenges.
keyTakeaways: Identify borrowers with strong liquid assets but high DTI failures.
Calculate potential income using asset depletion methodologies.
Ensure proper documentation to verify asset ownership and liquidity.
Utilize PRO Portal for loan structuring and pipeline management.
Avoid common mistakes by verifying all asset types and accessibility.

sections.heading: Understanding Asset Depletion
sections.body: Asset depletion is ideal for borrowers with significant liquid assets but insufficient traditional income documentation. This approach calculates income based on assets, making it perfect for retirees or high-net-worth individuals.
bullets: Target borrowers with high liquidity in brokerage or retirement accounts.
Focus on 36- or 60-month asset lookbacks for income calculation.

sections.heading: Actionable Steps to Close More Loans
sections.body: Search your pipeline for AUS denials due to high DTI. Review account statements and calculate potential income. Ensure all documentation, including CPA letters, is clear and up-to-date.
bullets: Log in to PRO Portal to structure loans with asset depletion.
Verify asset ownership and liquidity to avoid underwriting delays.

sections.heading: Common Pitfalls and How to Avoid Them
sections.body: Many brokers miss opportunities by not accounting for all asset types or failing to verify ownership. Proper documentation is crucial to prevent underwriting delays and ensure smooth approvals.
bullets: Double-check all asset categories and ensure accessibility.
Maintain clear, current documentation for faster processing.

metaDescription: Explore Non-QM asset depletion loans to convert high-asset, low-income borrowers into approvals. Act now to close more loans.
